title: PROP-EPNS-013 (Clock.now() budget per path) not implemented as property test
description: The verification architecture marks PROP-EPNS-013 as a Tier 1 property (fast-check) proof obligation: 'fast-check / spy wrapper: instrument Clock.now; verify call count per path matches budget table'. The implementation tests in pipeline.test.ts verify clock call counts with example-based tests (lines 440-513), not property-based tests. While the example tests cover the budget table cases, they do not use fast-check with generated inputs as specified. This is a deviation from the verification architecture's stated tool requirement.

evidence.snippet:
test("idle path: Clock.now() called exactly once (in startNewSession)", () => {
  let clockCalls = 0;

recommendation: Either upgrade the clock budget tests to use fast-check property tests (generating arbitrary valid inputs for each path and verifying the clock call count), or document the deviation as an accepted risk in the verification architecture.
